_comment: Mid-call state for the research dispatch subgraph. Simulates entry after prepare_research has generated and review_research_plan has approved a plan. All four task types included so each worker branch (slr, lbd, deep_web, edison) is exercised.

research_plan.query: RCT evidence for insecticide-treated bednets reducing under-5 malaria mortality in sub-Saharan Africa
Novel mechanisms linking pyrethroid resistance to LLIN efficacy loss in Anopheles gambiae
WHO 2024 global malaria report findings on LLIN coverage targets and distribution gaps
cost-effectiveness of next-generation pyrethroid-PBO combination bednets in resistance settings
Seasonal malaria chemoprevention SP+AQ efficacy against drug-resistant Plasmodium falciparum in Sahel
